headline: TJX (TJX) Opens In Spain As It Eyes 1,700 More International Stores
summary: TJX Companies (NYSE:TJX) is expanding its international footprint with its first store opening in Spain. The company is pursuing new growth initiatives in the Middle East and Mexico through joint ventures and investments. Management has outlined plans to add more than 1,700 international store locations as part of its global strategy. TJX Companies, known for its off price retail model, is moving beyond its core U.S. base with a broader international push that includes Spain, the Middle...
